row_id: 1. All retention periods measured from the trigger event specified.

2. Claims data used for fraud detection model training is extracted and retained indefinitely in the fraud analytics data lake. Data is pseudonymized but re-identification is possible via claim reference number. This retention supports ongoing fraud model training and retrospective fraud analysis. No periodic review of this indefinite retention is scheduled. Approved by Head of Fraud (Brian Nolan) on 2024-06-15. Not reviewed by DPO or Privacy Team.
3. Backup copies follow primary retention schedule plus 30-day buffer.
